items.title: World Cup final viewing figures revealed as fans make overwhelming choice between BBC and ITV

items.summary: The biggest World Cup in history produced numbers to match. Forty-eight teams, 104 games and three host countries delivered a record 308 goals before Spain were crowned champions.
